description_long: This is a small, vintage-style gas station with a rectangular main building painted in a muted teal color. The structure features a flat roof with a small raised section and a canopy extending over the fueling area, supported by a single column. There are several red fuel pumps positioned under the canopy, and a prominent retro sign with a fish-shaped logo stands near the entrance. The station is surrounded by utility poles with overhead wires, and a small blue bench or bin is placed nearby. The ground around the station is textured to resemble a worn, slightly snowy or dusty surface.
description: A compact, teal-colored vintage gas station with a flat-roofed building, canopy, red fuel pumps, and a retro fish-shaped sign.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, canopy, red fuel pumps, and the fish-shaped sign prominently.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the building, utility poles, and the rear of the canopy structure.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the back of the building, the blue bench/bin, and the side of the canopy.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the rear wall, utility poles, and the blue bench/bin to the left.
attribute_fuel_pumps: Three red, vintage-style fuel pumps are visible under the canopy, each with a simple rectangular shape and no visible hoses, nozzles, or digital displays.
attribute_canopy_structure: A flat, rectangular canopy extends from the main building, supported by a single column, constructed from the same teal material as the building, with no visible lighting or signage attached.
attribute_station_signage: A large, retro fish-shaped sign is mounted on a pole near the entrance, colored red with a white background, and a smaller rectangular sign below it. No other signage or branding is visible.
attribute_convenience_store_entrance: A single main entrance is visible at the front of the building, featuring a standard door with a small overhang, but no clear signage or branding above the entrance.
